override.reason: The `test-foundation` milestone intentionally contains no `fulfills`-mapped user-visible assertions, so there is nothing for user-testing to execute yet. This validator is accepted as setup-only for the milestone. The Redis healthcheck drift noted during setup was corrected in `.factory/services.yaml` by replacing the unavailable `redis-cli` dependency with a Python socket-based PING check.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No fulfills-derived user-testing assertions were assigned to milestone test-foundation; dedicated schema proof via direct psql also timed out during bounded checks.
